ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FRRouting/frr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FRRouting/frr
Language: c
The FRRouting Protocol Suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS
Language: c
'Classic' FreeRTOS distribution. Started as Git clone of FreeRTOS SourceForge SVN repo. Submodules the kernel.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
Language: c
FreeRTOS kernel files only, submoduled into https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS and various other repos.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OP-TEE/optee_os
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OP-TEE/optee_os
Language: c
Trusted side of the TEE

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/nuttx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/nuttx
Language: c
Apache NuttX is a mature, real-time embedded operating system (RTOS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluent/fluent-bit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit
Language: c
Fast and Lightweight Logs, Metrics and Traces processor for Linux, BSD, OSX and Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nrfconnect/sdk-nrf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nrfconnect/sdk-nrf
Language: c
nRF Connect SDK main repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbatard/rufus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbatard/rufus
Language: c
The Reliable USB Formatting Utility

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pgvector/pgvector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector
Language: c
Open-source vector similarity search for Postgres

ns0:entry.ns0:title: php/php-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/php/php-src
Language: c
The PHP Interpreter

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qmk/qmk_firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qmk/qmk_firmware
Language: c
Open-source keyboard firmware for Atmel AVR and Arm USB families

ns0:entry.ns0:title: signalwire/freeswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/signalwire/freeswitch
Language: c
FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a versatile software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. From a Raspberry PI to a multi-core server, FreeSWITCH can unlock the telecommunications potential of any device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: timescale/timescaledb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/timescale/timescaledb
Language: c
A time-series database for high-performance real-time analytics packaged as a Postgres extension

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tmux/tmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tmux/tmux
Language: c
tmux source code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ventoy/Ventoy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ventoy/Ventoy
Language: c
A new bootable USB solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winfsp/winfsp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winfsp/winfsp
Language: c
Windows File System Proxy - FUSE for Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
